changelog: Fixed reset.sh and first_boot.sh's production path both wiping the wrong Tailscale data directory (/addons/data/... instead of /apps/data/...), which no-op'd silently -- every factory-reset device was reconnecting with its OLD Tailscale identity instead of registering fresh. This broke the golden-image cloning workflow: cloned SD cards would all share one Funnel URL instead of each getting a unique one.
